message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
participant "接入平台的前端页" as Frontend1 #D3E5F2#0468C7 
database authDB { }
actor redis {} 

Frontend1 -> StarterAuth : 未登录的请求自动重定向\n获取用户信息接口请求  
StarterAuth --> RedisCache : 查询缓存中的授权码关联的用户信息(有效期：60s)  

alt if cache hit then   
    note right of RedisCache:返回已存在的authCode及对应的userInfo数据给前端页面进行跳转操作;    
else     
   alt else branch for creating new one      
       create participant AuthCenterLoginPage       
        activate AuthCenterLoginPage        
         loop while user not logged in yet             
             UserInputCredentials-->UserValidationLogic:"验证用户名密码是否正确?"              
              opt login failed                  
                  return error message to client side               
               endopt            
           endwhile          
          deactivate AuthenticationProcessFlowComponent           
            generateUniqueAuthorizationTokenAndStoreItInRedisWithExpiryTimeSetToSixtySeconds()
